productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Navy Crew Length Socks
description: CompositionNavy blue socks made of 100% cotton, with blue and grey and border at the ankle and heelMeasurementCrew lengthWash careMachine wash warm in not more than 40 degreesUse non-chlorine bleach if neededDo not use softenersTumble dry lowDo not dry cleanDo not ironGuaranteed to stay soft and cushioned after multiple washes, these socks from wrangler are ideal wear with sneakers or formal shoes.
